title: 10 Sheets of wet and dry sandpaper
features: Ideal for sanding metal, wood, painted surfaces and plastic
4 assorted grits available in extra fine, fine, medium and coarse
Supplied in polybag with header card
description: Product Description Blackspur 10 piece wet and dry abrasive paper set has 4 assorted grits available in extra fine, fine, medium and coarse. It is ideal for sanding metal, wood, painted surfaces and plastic. Measures 280mm length by 230mm width. Supplied in polybag with header card. Supplying quality products. One of the most comprehensive ranges of hand tools and DIY associated products in the UK. Box Contains 10x Abrasive Paper
